label_verbatim: FIRST: The date the original articles of incorporation were filed
rationale: Original incorporation-filing date of the corporation.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The date on which the dissolution was authorized is
rationale: Date the dissolution was authorized internally.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The future effective date of the articles of dissolution (if other than the date of filing) is
rationale: Optional delayed effective date; blank means effective on filing.

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature of any duly authorized officer) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Single text field on the signature row; treating as printed name + capacity (e.g., 'Jane Doe, President').

label_verbatim: FOURTH: [Check if applicable] The proposal to dissolve was duly approved by the shareholders in the manner required by this Act and by the corporation's articles of incorporation.
rationale: Boolean affirming statutory shareholder approval (only relevant when shares have been issued).

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
Email address to use for annual report reminders
rationale: Persistent annual-report reminder email — note: dissolved entities won't receive future reports, so this is typically left blank.
